title: Welcome to marvschwamm.de
aboutme_text: Click here to visit my About Me page.
aboutme_content:
Hi, I'm Marvin, or as some people know me: marv_schwamm.

I'm a passionate programmer and I'm currently working on this website you are looking at right now.
I also enjoy developing games, although none of them are fully finished yet. Most of my projects are automation-based games, such as "Factorythm", where you create music using impulses.

Another project is "SoulSide", a game that was originally inspired by Silksong. However, it was never completed - so far it has only become a small one-room jump-and-run.

But I don't only like developing games, I also enjoy playing them - quite a lot. I especially like games such as Satisfactory or Factorio, both of which are automation games.

I am also very proud that I completed "Turing Complete" at the age of 13 - a game where you learn CPU architecture and build your own small computer.

Games like Grounded have also taken up many hours on Steam, but Minecraft is unmatched with over 700 hours of playtime. In Minecraft, I play on the Hugo SMP by the German streamer LetsHugo. I am very interested in Redstone engineering and have already built a calculator. I am currently working on a binary-to-decimal converter.

However, I am not only active in the virtual world. I also play handball and table tennis. I have been playing handball since I was 5 years old and I still really enjoy it. I started table tennis about two years ago, and I enjoy that as well.

You can also find me on Twitch at https://www.twitch.tv/marvschw6mm where I occasionally stream games, or on YouTube at https://www.youtube.com/@marvschwamm.
